englishDefinitions: Moves to the correct position on set, as instructed by the director or camera crew.
Performs exactly as planned, especially in acting or stage work.
persianTranslation: جای تعیین‌شدهٔ خود را دقیق می‌گیرد
examples: The actor hits their marks perfectly in every take.
If she doesn't hit her marks, the camera focus will be off.
The assistant director reminded everyone to hit their marks before filming started.
